title: [HW][Comb][ESI] Create a common function for HW constant materialization and add null check
body:
This refactors HW dialect's constant materialization to a common function and use it in Comb/ESI dialects. Additionally, it adds a null check for parentOp in HW dialect's materializeConstant to prevent crashes when materializing constants in blocks without parent operations (otherwise a test case in unittest causes segfault) similar to https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/b9004ca0d6744574918b67222c6d638ca74f7428. 

A new test case is added to verify that parameter attribute materialization doesn't crash when the insertion block has no parent operation.
